description: openhost crypto test vectors. Every implementation MUST pass all of these to claim v1 conformance.
encoding_notes: Sealed-box outputs are non-deterministic (ephemeral sender keypair is random); conformance tests verify roundtrip rather than specific ciphertext bytes.
Allowlist HMAC takes the first 16 bytes of the 32-byte HMAC-SHA256 output.
auth_bytes is HKDF-SHA256 with salt 'openhost-auth-v1' and info 'openhost-auth-v1', over a 32-byte TLS exporter secret, producing 32 bytes.

x25519_from_ed25519.name: rfc8032_vector1_pair_roundtrips_sealed_box
x25519_from_ed25519.behavior: public_key_to_x25519 applied to the RFC 8032 #1 Ed25519 public key MUST equal signing_key_to_x25519(sk).public_key() (public-key-derivation consistency). The resulting keypair MUST successfully round-trip a sealed-box plaintext of arbitrary length.
